problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Perovskite. Perovskite crystal structure optimization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
